titleStmt.title: SII 26.434: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 434. (A.R. No. 413 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is built in at the bottom and hence the details of the gift are not available now.

It, however, seems to record a gift of taxes on weavers' looms, etc., situated in the streets around the temple of the god Tiruppulippagavadēvar of Śiṟṟiṅgūr a brahmadēśam in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟam in Malāḍu in Irājarāja-vaḷanāḍu and probably income from Vikkirama-śōḻanallūr also, to the same god, by a certain Ēḻiśaimōhan alias Jananātha-Kachchiyarāyaṉ, son of Āḷappiṟandān Araśanārāyaṇaṉ of Kūḍalūr. (See S.I.I., Vol. XII, p. 170, No. 9).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīvirarājentracoḻadevaṟ
ku yāṇṭu 6vatu kūṭalūr Āḷappiṟantān Aracanārāyaṇaṉ ma
kaṉ Eḻicaimokanāṉa jananātakacciyarayaṉeṉ Irājarāja
vaḷanāṭṭu malāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattup pirammatecañ ciṟṟi
ṅkūruṭaiyār tiruppulippakavatevarkku Ittevar tirumaṭaiviḷākamum vi
kkiramacoḻanallūrum tirumaṭaiviḷākamum Ittevar tirumaṭaiviḷāka
ttu nālucikkarattu Uṭpaṭṭiṉa kiḻiṟaippāṭṭamum taṟiiṟai taṭṭārpāṭṭa
mum Eṭuppiṉa kūvina Aḷappiṉa niṟum ṉavumellā yittevark�
Digital edition of SII 26.434 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
